response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video, identified song title "Adult Suit" (アダルスーツ) and composers via on-screen text at 00:29. 2. Identified performer as Tokoyami Towa. 3. Researched lyrics for "Adult Suit" by ONE OK ROCK. 4. Mapped scenes based on musical performance. 5. Compiled JSON.
response.global_summary: A video capturing a live performance of "Adult Suit" by Tokoyami Towa.

scenes.description: The video starts with a black screen, followed by a stage setup. No vocal music is playing.
Tokoyami Towa performs the song "Adult Suit", originally by ONE OK ROCK. The performance includes dancing and vocals. Text on screen at 00:29 indicates the song title and credits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Can you hear me when I cry in desperation?
Nothing comes along with my expectation
How much pain and ache you’re feeling?
Breathing?
I gotta change this situation

アダルトなキグルミ着てる僕
心はいつも不安定 天秤シーソー
まさかの発言で凍り付かす 印籠見え隠れ
血迷うボク
今日の今この瞬間に放とうとする言葉がいつも
後ろ髪引く
全部ダメダメ なんてでしょ? じゃあもう放棄して!
ハナから無かった事にしよ!! ラリるラリラリラ
それじゃダメダメ 悪いクセだね! もうしない!
どうせ着せられているならキメキメでいこう!

何もかもが暗く黒く見える!
色メガネ付きのアダルトなパチモンスーツ
必殺技×0で全部消し去ろうか? 強気なボク(笑)
だけど実際はやっぱり出来やしないの
身軽さを奪われ動けない
それでうまいことバランスとれてるんだよ!
きみは耳元でそれを言う! それにしちゃ少し
あんまりじゃない? っていうか不公平じゃない?
どうせ勝ち目なんてないし食い気味でいこう!

I feel this moment
No one can take it
そう 何回だって 伝わらなけりゃ 意味無い!

今日の今この瞬間が大事なの!
奪う権利はあなた方にはない!!
全部ダメダメ! 何がダメダメ? なんでしょう?
納得いくまで話してよ!
どうせ屁理屈並べるんだろ? バカみたい
とどめをさす気でいるなら?
今がチャンスだぞ!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Can you hear me when I cry in desperation?
Nothing comes along with my expectation
How much pain and ache you’re feeling?
Breathing?
I gotta change this situation

I’m wearing an adult costume
My heart is always unstable, a seesaw balance
The unexpected remark freezes everything, and my indecisive self is hidden
I feel like I’m always held back by words I try to say in this moment, right now
Everything is useless, isn't it? Then let's just give it up!
Let's pretend it never happened from the start!! Rari ru rari rari ra
Then it's useless, that's a bad habit! I won't do it anymore!
If I'm being made to wear it, let's just do it with style!
Everything looks dark and black!
An adult knock-off suit with tinted glasses
Should I erase everything with my special move x 0? The confident me (lol)
But in reality, I can't do it, my agility is stolen and I can't move
That's how I keep a good balance!
You say that in my ear! For that, isn't it a bit
Too much? Or is it unfair?
Anyway, there's no chance of winning, so let's just jump into it!

I feel this moment
No one can take it
Yeah, no matter how many times, if it isn't conveyed, it means nothing!

This moment, right now, is important!
You have no right to take it away!!
Everything is useless! What is useless? What could it be?
Talk to me until I'm satisfied!
Anyway, you'll just make excuses, won't you? It's pathetic
If you intend to finish me off?
Now is your chance!

scenes.description: The performance ends, and Tokoyami Towa talks to the audience. No vocal music is playing.
